title: Sites Default Files File 2022 09 Somali 20Top 2010 20Tenants 2C 20Inside
content:
KULEELKA IYO DANABKA
1 NOOCYADA DAGGANAASHADA 5
Caadi ahaan, heshiiska kirada wuxuu socdaa hal sanno, waa heshiis Dagganaha waxaa laga dalban karaa oo keliya in uu bixiyo danabka haddii
sharciga waafaqsan oo waajibaad saara dhinacyada. Heshiiska kirada waxay ay jiraan cabbir u gaar ah adeegga la soo dallaco. Milkiilaha hantidaada
ku siiyaan sekuriti. Hubso in aad akhrisid heshiiska ka hor inta aadan waa in uu bixiyo kuleelka iyo biyaha kulul haddii aadan saxiixin heshiis
saxiixin, iyo hayso koobi aad gashatid diiwaankaada. Haddii uu jiro qof kula qoran oo sheega in aad adiga bixisid.
dggan oo ka baxa, waxaa dhici karto in adiga aad weli mas'uul ka tahay
DAMMAANADDA SEKURITIGA
bixinta qeybta kiradooda ilaa aad ka heshid qof cusub oo kula soo dagga.
6
Haddii la kordhiyo kiradaada, waa in aad baaqiga ka bixisid damaanadda
Dagganaashada ku saleysan heshiiska la soo afjari karo waqti kasta, ha laga
iyo kirada bishii la soo dhaafay. Milkiilahaada hantida waa in uu kuu soo
sheego afka ama ha la qoro, wuxuu shaqeyaa bil-ilaa-bil. Heshiiska
celiyo damaanadda, lagu darray kor saar, muddo 30 maalin gudahooda
dagganaashada la soo afjari karo markii la rabo wuxuu leeyahay
kaddib marka aad guurtid, iyo waa in uu ku siiyo resiid saf-saf u muujiya
dabacsanaan, balse sugid yar, marka loo fiiriyo heshiiska kirada. Heshiiska
waxyaabaha uu goystay. Waa in aysan ka goynin kharashka ku baxa
dagganaashada la soo afjari karo markii la rab wuxuu ku siiyaa fursad in aad
waxyaabaha duugga iyo waxyaabaha dhamaada.
ka baxdid kaddib marka milkiilaha hantida aad siisid ogeysiis ku habboon
oo qoran muddo 30-maalin. Waxay kaloo u ogolaataa milkiilaha hantida in KHIDMADAHA SHARCIGA IYO KUWA SHARCI DARRADA
uu ku weydiiyo in aad ka baxdid ama in aad kordhisid kiradaada kuna siiyo 7
ogeysiis qoran oo ku habboon muddo 30-maalin. Sharci ahaan, waxaa laguu soo dallici karaa kirada kowaad iyo tan bishii
ugu dambaysay, damaanadda sekuritiga, khidmadda qufulka, iyo qeyb ka
tirsan khidmadda fattashaadda. WAA SHARCI DARRO in milkiilaha
2 KA HOR INTA AADAN SAXIIXIN HESHIISKA KIRADA hantidaada uu kugu soo dallaco khidmadda haynta, khidmadda xoolaha
Mar kasta fiiri abarmanka iyo dhismaha ka hor inta aadan saxiixin guri joogga, ama khidmadda geddisleyga/helaha. Iibiyeyaasha hantida ee
heshiiska kirada. Hubso in aysan ka mid ahayn liisaska khayaanada iyo iska shattiga haysta keliya ayaa kugu soo dallici karo khidmadda
fiiri in guriga iyo dhismaha si wanaagsan loo hagaajiya, leeyahiin gedisleyga/helaha. Haddii laguugu soo dallaco khidmadda sharci darro ah,
waxyaabaha ilaaliya ammaanka, qalab, iyo waxyaabaha la adeegsado. fadlan waxaad u soo sheegtaa Xafiiska Xeer Ilaaliyaha Guud (Attorney
General’s Office).
3 BAARISTA HORE DAGGANEYAASHA LACAGAHA KIRADA
8
Hubso in aad qortid dhamaan ashtakooyinkaada ama codsiyadaada soo
Waxaa fiican in AADAN kiradaada ku bixinin lacagta caddaanka, balse
qortid marka aad u gudbineysid milkiilaha hantida. Haddii adiga iyo
haddii aad sidaas samaysid, qaado resiid. Ma jirto "muddo leysu dhaafo"
milkiilaha hantidaada idin dhexmaro murran aadan adiga awoodin in aad
bixinta kirada. Waxaa lagaa rabaa in aad bixisid kirada taariikhda ku qoran
xallisid, waa in aad ku fakartid dhexdhexaadin. Dhexdhexaadinta waa hab
heshiiska dagganaashada. Waxaa dhici karto in laguugu soo dallaco
aan rasmi ahayn aad adiga iskudayaysid in xal la gaaro lana adeegsado
khidmadda soo daahidda, hase ahatee taasi waa in ay ku qoran tahay
dhexdhexaadiye aan dhinacna la jirin.
heshiis ogolaada. Xattaa haddii ay sidaas tahay, lama baddali karo
khidmaddaan haddii aan lala soo daahin kirada ugu yaraan 30 maalin.
Haddii aad u baahan tahay dhexdhexaadin, fadlan la xariir Xafiiska Sugidda
Haddii loo baahdo in aad bixisid kirada goor dambe, asbaab la xariira qof
Guriyeynta (Office of Housing Stability) telefoonka 617.635.4200 ama
ahaantaada, ha qarinin. U tag milkiilaha hantidaada kaddibna isduday in
housingstability@boston.gov. Waxaad kaloo haysataa fursad aad ashtakada
aad kala shaqeysid. Haddii aad gadaal uga dhacdid bixinta kirada, waxaa
macaamilka u gudbisid Xafiiska Xeer Ilaaliyaha Guud (Attorney General’s
dhici karto in aad xaq u yeelatid kaalmada kirada Magaalada Boston.
Office).
KA HOR INTA AADAN TAGIN
4 MEESHA LAGA GALO MILKIILAHA HANTIDA 9
Ka bax abarmanka iyadoo nadiif ah kana qaad sawiro ku saabsan xaaladda
Milkiilaha hantidaada wuxuu geli karaa gurigaada si uu u fattasho, u
guriga. Soo celi dhamaan fureyaasha Sii gudbinta warqadahaada Ogeysii
sameeyo hagaajin, iyo si uu guriga u tuso dagganeyaal suurtogal ah. Haddii
shirkadaha danabka. Qabso ballan in lagaa qaado waxyaabaha waaweyn,
aysan jirin degdeg, milkiilaha hantida iyo wakiilada milkiilaha hantida waa
haddii loo baahdo.
in aysan marna gelin abarmankaada haddii aysan horay kuu soo ogeysiinin
iyo aysan kaa helin ruqsad. Milkiilaha hantida waa in uu ku siiyo ugu yaraan
CEYMISKA KIREESTAHA
hal maalin ogeysiis iyo waa in uu iskudayo in uu kuu habeeyo waqti ku 10
habboon uu ku soo galo guriga. Iibso ceymiska kireestaha Waa qiimo yar oo la bixiyo haddii ay jirto masalo
weyn.
